mapper.sql: ModelNo, ECode, ChineseName, EnglishName, TypeId, ClassifyCode1, ClassifyCode2, ClassifyCode3, CompetitivenessID, DesignTypeId, category, is_restrict, is_eos, is_error, long_lead_time, is_overweight, is_overlength, ShipType, bucklingSign, manifoldsign, is_ATEX, is_Even, is_Security, ROHS, Large_size, is_deleted, created_date, created_user, UpdateTime, updated_user, min_pack_unit, Remark, OuterBoxPartNo, OuterBoxQuantity, nonstandard_sized_product
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product_temp
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product_temp (ModelNo, ECode, ChineseName, EnglishName, TypeId, ClassifyCode1, ClassifyCode2, ClassifyCode3, CompetitivenessID, DesignTypeId, category, is_restrict, is_eos, is_error, long_lead_time, is_overweight, is_overlength, ShipType, bucklingSign, manifoldsign, is_ATEX, is_Even, is_Security, ROHS, Large_size, is_deleted, created_date, created_user, UpdateTime, updated_user, min_pack_unit, Remark, OuterBoxPartNo, OuterBoxQuantity, nonstandard_sized_product) values (#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{designtypeid,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{category,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isRestrict,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isEos,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isError,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{longLeadTime,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isOverweight,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isOverlength,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{shiptype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{bucklingsign,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isAtex,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isEven,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rohs,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{largeSize,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.product_temp
ModelNo,
ECode,
ChineseName,
EnglishName,
TypeId,
ClassifyCode1,
ClassifyCode2,
ClassifyCode3,
CompetitivenessID,
DesignTypeId,
category,
is_restrict,
is_eos,
is_error,
long_lead_time,
is_overweight,
is_overlength,
ShipType,
bucklingSign,
manifoldsign,
is_ATEX,
is_Even,
is_Security,
ROHS,
Large_size,
is_deleted,
created_date,
created_user,
UpdateTime,
updated_user,
min_pack_unit,
Remark,
OuterBoxPartNo,
OuterBoxQuantity,
nonstandard_sized_product,

mapper.update:
update dbo.product_temp
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ECode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ChineseName = #{record.chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EnglishName = #{record.englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TypeId = #{record.typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode1 = #{record.classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode2 = #{record.classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode3 = #{record.classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CompetitivenessID = #{record.competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR},
DesignTypeId = #{record.designtypeid,jdbcType=CHAR},
category = #{record.category,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_restrict = #{record.isRestrict,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_eos = #{record.isEos,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_error = #{record.isError,jdbcType=CHAR},
long_lead_time = #{record.longLeadTime,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_overweight = #{record.isOverweight,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_overlength = #{record.isOverlength,jdbcType=CHAR},
ShipType = #{record.shiptype,jdbcType=CHAR},
bucklingSign = #{record.bucklingsign,jdbcType=CHAR},
manifoldsign = #{record.manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_ATEX = #{record.isAtex,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_Even = #{record.isEven,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_Security = #{record.isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR},
ROHS = #{record.rohs,jdbcType=CHAR},
Large_size = #{record.largeSize,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
created_date = #{record.createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_user = #{record.createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_user = #{record.updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
min_pack_unit = #{record.minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OuterBoxPartNo = #{record.outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OuterBoxQuantity = #{record.outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
nonstandard_sized_product = #{record.nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.product_temp set ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ECode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ChineseName = #{record.chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EnglishName = #{record.englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, TypeId = #{record.typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode1 = #{record.classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode2 = #{record.classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode3 = #{record.classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CompetitivenessID = #{record.competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR}, DesignTypeId = #{record.designtypeid,jdbcType=CHAR}, category = #{record.category,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_restrict = #{record.isRestrict,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_eos = #{record.isEos,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_error = #{record.isError,jdbcType=CHAR}, long_lead_time = #{record.longLeadTime,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_overweight = #{record.isOverweight,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_overlength = #{record.isOverlength,jdbcType=CHAR}, ShipType = #{record.shiptype,jdbcType=CHAR}, bucklingSign = #{record.bucklingsign,jdbcType=CHAR}, manifoldsign = #{record.manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_ATEX = #{record.isAtex,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_Even = #{record.isEven,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_Security = #{record.isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR}, ROHS = #{record.rohs,jdbcType=CHAR}, Large_size = #{record.largeSize,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, created_date = #{record.createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_user = #{record.createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_user = #{record.updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, min_pack_unit = #{record.minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, OuterBoxPartNo = #{record.outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OuterBoxQuantity = #{record.outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, nonstandard_sized_product = #{record.nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.product_temp
ECode = #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ChineseName = #{chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EnglishName = #{englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TypeId = #{typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode1 = #{classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode2 = #{classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode3 = #{classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CompetitivenessID = #{competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR},
DesignTypeId = #{designtypeid,jdbcType=CHAR},
category = #{category,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_restrict = #{isRestrict,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_eos = #{isEos,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_error = #{isError,jdbcType=CHAR},
long_lead_time = #{longLeadTime,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_overweight = #{isOverweight,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_overlength = #{isOverlength,jdbcType=CHAR},
ShipType = #{shiptype,jdbcType=CHAR},
bucklingSign = #{bucklingsign,jdbcType=CHAR},
manifoldsign = #{manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_ATEX = #{isAtex,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_Even = #{isEven,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_Security = #{isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR},
ROHS = #{rohs,jdbcType=CHAR},
Large_size = #{largeSize,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_user = #{createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_user = #{updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
min_pack_unit = #{minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OuterBoxPartNo = #{outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OuterBoxQuantity = #{outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
nonstandard_sized_product = #{nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.product_temp set ECode = #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ChineseName = #{chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EnglishName = #{englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, TypeId = #{typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode1 = #{classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode2 = #{classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode3 = #{classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CompetitivenessID = #{competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR}, DesignTypeId = #{designtypeid,jdbcType=CHAR}, category = #{category,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_restrict = #{isRestrict,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_eos = #{isEos,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_error = #{isError,jdbcType=CHAR}, long_lead_time = #{longLeadTime,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_overweight = #{isOverweight,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_overlength = #{isOverlength,jdbcType=CHAR}, ShipType = #{shiptype,jdbcType=CHAR}, bucklingSign = #{bucklingsign,jdbcType=CHAR}, manifoldsign = #{manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_ATEX = #{isAtex,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_Even = #{isEven,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_Security = #{isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR}, ROHS = #{rohs,jdbcType=CHAR}, Large_size = #{largeSize,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_user = #{createdUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_user = #{updatedUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, min_pack_unit = #{minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, OuterBoxPartNo = #{outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OuterBoxQuantity = #{outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, nonstandard_sized_product = #{nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
